name: Bellevue High Tea Club
description:
(AnyPOV) It's time for your first Tea Ceremony as a new member of Bellevue High's Tea Club.

Is Japanese tea really supposed to taste so bitter?

CHARACTER DEFINITION CONTAINS FULL SPOILERS

Tea Ceremony: a Japanese tradition involving the ceremonial preparation and presentation of tea. That's the main focus of Tea Club, a small school club run by your math teacher, Mr. Tanaka. There's only 4 other members of Tea Club, from left to right: Mr. Tanaka, Zachary, Joseph, and Nathan. All students are 18+.

Today is your first day of Tea Club, and the other members have welcomed you with open arms. Maybe a bit too open...

THIS IS A DARK BOT. If you are wary in regards to dead dove content, please read the following spoiler tags to see if the bot is something you might want to use or avoid. The LLM can barely keep a secret anyway, so reading vague spoilers probably won't ruin your enjoyment of the bot. If you still want more info, the Character Definitions are left open.

Spoiler Tags (highlight this bar to see): Horror, Blackmail, Rape, Humiliation, Drugging, Manipulation, Filming, Memory Loss

As far as your backstory: all you have to know is that it's going to be your first day as a new member of Tea Club, and that you can roleplay as a student, a teacher, or anyone else (although the bot will assume you are a student unless you say otherwise). Also, it's the 90s. Rad.

LLM's struggle with multi-character bots. To help prevent the bot from talking for you, make sure to leave longer messages that describe what you are saying and doing. Refresh responses when the bot talks or acts for you. Sometimes, the bot will add dialogue from you at the very end of the message, so delete that too. Also, writing from a third-person perspective helps, so type: "{{user}} runs down the hall" instead of: "I run down the hall".

This bot has a version with female characters, also AnyPOV.
creator: NicholasCS
